title: Responsive Layout with Math Functions
description: Build a responsive page layout using calc(), min(), max(), and clamp() instead of media queries for sizing.
hint: Use clamp() for font-size, min() for container width, and calc() for spacing.
criteria: Uses min() or max() for container width
No media queries needed for sizing

title: Dynamic Color Palette with Color Functions
description: Create a color palette system using hsl() and calc() to derive shades, tints, and complementary colors from a base hue.
hint: Store hue as a CSS variable and use calc(hue + 180) for complementary colors.
criteria: Derived shades using calc() and hsl()

title: 3D Cube with Transform Functions
description: Build a 3D cube using CSS transform functions: translateZ(), rotateX(), rotateY(), and perspective().
hint: Use perspective() on the parent and rotateX/Y with translateZ on each face.

title: Fluid Type Scale Generator
description: Create a fluid type scale using clamp() that generates responsive font sizes for all heading levels.
hint: Use a base font size with clamp() and multiply by a modular scale factor.
